mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lamination_material_products ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT * FROM lamination_material_products WHERE material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR color LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE lamination_material_products SET material_code = #{materialCode}, stock_code = #{stockCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, usage_text = #{usageText}, material_type = #{materialType}, thickness_film = #{thicknessFilm}, thickness_glue = #{thicknessGlue}, size_info = #{sizeInfo}, color = #{color}, shape = #{shape}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, category = #{category}, is_active = #{isActive}, film_thickness = #{filmThickness}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lamination_material_compatibility WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM lamination_material_compatibility ORDER BY product_id ASC, display_order ASC
SELECT * FROM lamination_material_compatibility WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND post_processing_step = #{postProcessingStep}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lamination_material_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, remark, display_order) VALUES (#{productId}, #{postProcessingStep}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{remark}, #{displayOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE lamination_material_compatibility SET product_id = #{productId}, post_processing_step = #{postProcessingStep}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, remark = #{remark}, display_order = #{displayOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO lamination_material_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, remark, display_order) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.postProcessingStep}, #{item.compatibilityStatus}, #{item.remark}, #{item.displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT post_processing_step FROM lamination_material_compatibility ORDER BY post_processing_step ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM lamination_material_products p
INNER JOIN lamination_material_compatibility c ON p.id = c.product_id
AND (p.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.color LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.material_type IN
#{type}
AND c.post_processing_step IN
#{step}
SELECT DISTINCT post_processing_step FROM lamination_material_compatibility ORDER BY post_processing_step ASC
SELECT DISTINCT material_type FROM lamination_material_products WHERE material_type IS NOT NULL AND material_type != '' ORDER BY material_type ASC
